L
o90 -- 2q SWWW build start
-- split and build ott on one version ... the other version is base of SWWW

-- neighborhood of 63 is already forbidden (57-69) till 4q EEEE
-- neghborhood of 20 already blocked at .2q (somewhere between SSSW and SSWW)
